desc: Lit emitter must NOT rewrite an ImportSpecifier's `imported` name to `this.X` when an aliased import's imported name (`undo`/`redo`) equals an $expose verb — the promoted-name rewrite skips import/export specifier name slots
discoveredBy: regenerating @rozie-ui/codemirror with undo/redo $expose verbs imported as `{ undo as undoCmd }` — codegen threw in @babel/types
